allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "from src.main import app; from src.endpoints.v1 import router; print\('Routes:', [r.path for r in router.routes]\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "from agents.bus.channel import channel_for_session; from agents.contracts import OrchestratorTaskInput, AgentEvent; print\('OK — agents package imports correctly'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(t['labels'].get\('job','?'\), t['health'], t['lastError']\) for t in d['data']['activeTargets']]")
Bash(python -c "import sys; lines=[l for l in sys.stdin if l.startswith\('# HELP'\)]; print\('\\n'.join\(lines\)\)")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:9090/api/v1/targets" -UseBasicParsing\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json | ForEach-Object { $_.data.activeTargets } | Select-Object @{N="job";E={$_.labels.job}}, health, lastError | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(\(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:9090/api/v1/targets" -UseBasicParsing\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json | ForEach-Object { $_.data.activeTargets } | Select-Object @{N="job";E={$_.labels.job}}, health | Format-Table -AutoSize)
Bash("C:/Users/User/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python312/python.exe" -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, 'src'\); import agents.intake.models; print\('models OK'\)")

Bash("C:/Users/User/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python312/python.exe" -m py_compile src/agents/intake/models.py src/agents/intake/slot_extractor.py src/agents/intake/profile_builder.py src/agents/intake/intake_agent.py src/agents/intake/__init__.py src/agents/intake/tests/test_intake_agent.py)

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\User\\Documents\\career-roadmap-ai\\agents"; $env:PATH = "C:\\Users\\User\\.pyenv\\pyenv-win\\shims;$env:PATH"; python --version; python -c "import pytest; print\('pytest ok'\)" 2>&1)

PowerShell(\(Get-Item "C:\\Users\\User\\Documents\\career-roadmap-ai\\documentation\\implementation_summaries\\learning-resource-agent.md"\).Length; ls "C:\\Users\\User\\Documents\\career-roadmap-ai\\documentation\\implementation_summaries" | Sort-Object LastWriteTime | Select-Object Name, Length)
